title: Complete Sprint should Complete Across All Tasks (Monday Dev)
excerpt:

posts.author: taylortaylor (Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
In Monday Dev, I can hit “Complete Sprint” to trigger Monday to move Not Done items to the next sprint. Great!

The problem is I have more than one Task Board connected to the Sprint Board and when I use the Complete Sprint button, it only moves items in the Board I am currently in, even if I have permissions in all the other boards. I’d really like to be able to hit “Complete Sprint” to move all items in all Task Boards to move all my teams to the next sprint.

I’d be fine if this button were in the Sprint Board or similar.
